summary: Chungpoong receives a powerful graduation ring that boosts his stats and upgrades his magical abilities, while simultaneously accepting a quest to eliminate the Shadow Division heads. With the help of his allies, he systematically tracks and takes down the targets, even deploying Tangyi for a specialized mission to capture a key villain. The chapter concludes with the group regrouping at an outpost, plotting to undermine the Shadow Division by targeting their core operations rather than relying on brute force alone.
key_moments: Chungpoong equips the Graduation Ring and upgrades his Heavenly Demon's Dark Art.
Chungpoong and his team initiate the quest to kill the Shadow Division heads.
Tangyi is sent on a special mission to capture a villain with a large wart.
The team gathers at a forest outpost to strategize against the Shadow Division's leadership.
